BlindSpot.title: [TIZI/TICI only] Blind Spot Detection
BlindSpot.description: Enabling this will display warnings when a vehicle is detected in your blind spot as long as your car has BSM supported.

BlinkerLateralReengageDelay.title: Post-Blinker Delay
BlinkerLateralReengageDelay.description: Delay before lateral control resumes after the turn signal ends.

CameraOffset.title: Adjust Camera Offset
CameraOffset.description: Virtually shift camera's perspective to move model's center to Left(+ values) or Right (- values)

CustomTorqueParams.title: Enable Custom Torque Tuning
CustomTorqueParams.description: Enables custom tuning for Torque lateral control

EnforceTorqueControl.title: Enforce Torque Control
EnforceTorqueControl.description: Enable this to enforce sunnypilot to steer with Torque lateral control.

GreenLightAlert.title: Green Traffic Light Alert (Beta)
GreenLightAlert.description:
A chime and on-screen alert (TIZI/TICI only) will play when the traffic light you are waiting for turns green and you have no vehicle in front of you.
Note: This chime is only designed as a notification. It is the driver's responsibility to observe their environment and make decisions accordingly.

HideVEgoUI.title: [TIZI/TICI only] Speedometer: Hide from Onroad Screen
HideVEgoUI.description: When enabled, the speedometer on the onroad screen is not displayed.

InteractivityTimeout.title: Interactivity Timeout
InteractivityTimeout.description: Apply a custom timeout for settings UI. This is the time after which settings UI closes automatically if user is not interacting with the screen.

LagdToggle.title: Live Learning Steer Delay
LagdToggle.description: Allow device to learn and adapt car's steering response time

LagdToggleDelay.title: Manual Software Delay
LagdToggleDelay.description: Software delay to use when Live Learning Steer Delay is toggled off

LaneTurnDesire.title: Lane Turn Desire
LaneTurnDesire.description: Force model to plan an intent to turn based on blinker

LaneTurnValue.title: Lane Turn Speed
LaneTurnValue.description: Maximum speed for lane turn desire

LeadDepartAlert.title: Lead Departure Alert (Beta)
LeadDepartAlert.description:
A chime and on-screen alert (TIZI/TICI only) will play when you are stopped, and the vehicle in front of you start moving.
Note: This chime is only designed as a notification. It is the driver's responsibility to observe their environment and make decisions accordingly.

LiveTorqueParamsRelaxedToggle.title: Less Restrict Settings for Self-Tune (Beta)
LiveTorqueParamsRelaxedToggle.description: Less strict settings when using Self-Tune. This allows torqued to be more forgiving when learning values.

LiveTorqueParamsToggle.title: Self-Tune
LiveTorqueParamsToggle.description: Enables self-tune for Torque lateral control

OnroadScreenOffBrightnessMigrated.title: Onroad Brightness Migration Version
OnroadScreenOffBrightnessMigrated.description: This param is to track whether OnroadScreenOffBrightness needs to be migrated.

OnroadScreenOffControl.title: Onroad Brightness
OnroadScreenOffControl.description: Adjusts the screen brightness while it's in onroad state.

OnroadScreenOffTimerMigrated.title: Onroad Brightness Delay Migration Version
OnroadScreenOffTimerMigrated.description: This param is to track whether OnroadScreenOffTimer needs to be migrated.

PlanplusControl.title: Plan Plus Controls
PlanplusControl.description: Adjust planplus model recentering strength. The higher this number the more aggressively the model will recover to lanecenter, too high and it will ping-pong

RoadNameToggle.title: [TIZI/TICI only] Display Road Name
RoadNameToggle.description:
Displays the name of the road the car is traveling on.
The OpenStreetMap database of the location must be downloaded to fetch the road name.

RocketFuel.title: [TIZI/TICI only] Real-time Acceleration Bar
RocketFuel.description: Show an indicator on the left side of the screen to display real-time vehicle acceleration and deceleration. This displays what the car is currently doing, not what the planner is requesting.

ShowAdvancedControls.title: Show Advanced Controls
ShowAdvancedControls.description: Enable to show advanced controls on device

ShowTurnSignals.title: [TIZI/TICI only] Display Turn Signals
ShowTurnSignals.description: When enabled, visual turn indicators are drawn on the HUD.

StandstillTimer.title: [TIZI/TICI only] Standstill Timer
StandstillTimer.description: Show a timer on the HUD when the car is at a standstill.

SubaruStopAndGoManualParkingBrake.title: Subaru Stop and Go Manual Parking Brake

TorqueBar.title: [TIZI/TICI only] Steering Arc
TorqueBar.description: Display steering arc on the driving screen when lateral control is enabled.

TorqueControlTune.title: Torque Control Tune Version
TorqueControlTune.description: Select the version of Torque Control Tune to use.

ToyotaEnforceStockLongitudinal.title: Toyota: Enforce Factory Longitudinal Control
ToyotaEnforceStockLongitudinal.description: When enabled, sunnypilot will not take over control of gas and brakes. Factory Toyota longitudinal control will be used.

ToyotaStopAndGoHack.title: Toyota: Stop and Go Hack (Alpha)
ToyotaStopAndGoHack.description: sunnypilot will allow some Toyota/Lexus cars to auto resume during stop and go traffic. This feature is only applicable to certain models that are able to use longitudinal control. This is an alpha feature. Use at your own risk.

TrueVEgoUI.title: [TIZI/TICI only] Speedometer: Always Display True Speed
TrueVEgoUI.description: For applicable vehicles, always display the true vehicle current speed from wheel speed sensors.

send_hands_free_cluster_msg.title: BluePilot: Enable Hands-Free UI
send_hands_free_cluster_msg.description: Enables hands-free (BlueCruise icon) on the gauge cluster for supported vehicles.

FordPrefShowRadarLeadOverlay.title: BluePilot: Show Radar Lead Overlay (C3X)
FordPrefShowRadarLeadOverlay.description: Displays a chevron with lead vehicle info (distance, speed, time) when using Ford stock ACC.

FordPrefRadarOverlaySize.title: BluePilot: Radar Overlay Size (C3X)
FordPrefRadarOverlaySize.description: Sets the size of the radar lead overlay chevron and info boxes. 0=Small, 1=Medium, 2=Large.

FordPrefHybridBatteryStatus.title: BluePilot: Show Hybrid/EV Battery Status (C3X)
FordPrefHybridBatteryStatus.description: Displays hybrid/EV battery status including state of charge (SOC), voltage, and current (amps) on the UI.

FordPrefHybridPowerFlow.title: BluePilot: Show Hybrid/EV Power Flow (C3X, C4)
FordPrefHybridPowerFlow.description: Enables the hybrid/EV power flow gauge. C3X: horizontal bar with regen (green) and throttle demand. C4: choose bar or circular (around steering wheel) via the alternate option below.

FordPrefHybridDriveGaugeSize.title: BluePilot: Hybrid/EV Gauge Size (C3X)
FordPrefHybridDriveGaugeSize.description: Sets the size of the hybrid/EV power flow and battery gauges. 1=Small (default), 2=Large.

FordPrefHybridGaugeStyle.title: BluePilot: Hybrid/EV Power Flow Style (C3X)
FordPrefHybridGaugeStyle.description: Flat: horizontal bar in shared container. Arched: arch above torque bar.

FordPrefHybridPowerFlowAlternate.title: BluePilot: Hybrid/EV Gauge Style (C4)
FordPrefHybridPowerFlowAlternate.description: Flat: horizontal bar. Round: circular gauge around steering wheel.

enable_human_turn_detection.title: BluePilot: Enable Human Turn Detection
enable_human_turn_detection.description: If enabled, steering will reset so you don't fight the wheel making manual turns.

lane_change_factor_high.title: BluePilot: Lane Change Factor High
lane_change_factor_high.description: Controls how much steering is applied during a lane change, with lower values making it smoother (0.6–0.8 typically working best). Values that are too low can cause an over-correction by openpilot and lead to aggressive lane changes.

pc_blend_ratio_high_C_UI.title: BluePilot: Predicted Curvature Blend Ratio High
pc_blend_ratio_high_C_UI.description: Adjust the blend ratio of predicted curvature in curves (0.4–0.6 typically working best).  High values will help with ping-pong, but too high will cause wander and drift.

pc_blend_ratio_low_C_UI.title: BluePilot: Predicted Curvature Blend Ratio Low
pc_blend_ratio_low_C_UI.description: Adjust the blend ratio of predicted curvature in straightaways (0.4–0.6 typically working best). High values will help with ping-pong, but too high will cause wander and drift.

enable_lane_positioning.title: BluePilot: Enable Advanced Lane Positioning
enable_lane_positioning.description: Allows custom lane positioning and lanefull mode.

custom_path_offset.title: BluePilot: In Lane Offset
custom_path_offset.description: Manually adjust lane position - left (-) / right (+)

enable_lane_full_mode.title: BluePilot: Enable Lanefull Mode
enable_lane_full_mode.description: Enable Auto Lanefull Mode similar to legacy SunnyPilot

custom_profile.title: BluePilot: Use Custom Tuning Profile
custom_profile.description: Use custom tuning settings for lateral control instead of defaults.

LC_PID_gain_UI.title: BluePilot: Low Curvature PID Gain
LC_PID_gain_UI.description: Controls how aggressive advanced lane positioning adjusts the car.  Higher values can result in tighter adherence to exact center of the path, but can cause twitchiness if set too high.

vbatt_pause_charging.title: BluePilot: Low Battery Voltage Shutdown
vbatt_pause_charging.description: Voltage at which BluePilot will shutdown and avoid draining the car battery.

mici_complication.title: BluePilot: Lower Right Corner Display (C4)
mici_complication.description: Show data in the lower right of the UI.

mici_hide_onroad_fade.title: BluePilot: Hide Onroad Fade (C4)
mici_hide_onroad_fade.description: Remove the fade at the bottom of the screen.

mici_hide_onroad_border.title: BluePilot: Hide Onroad Border (C4)
mici_hide_onroad_border.description: Remove the border from the screen.

BPHideOnroadBorder.title: BluePilot: Hide Onroad Border (C3X)
BPHideOnroadBorder.description: Hide the colored status border around the driving view on both TICI and MICI.

BPShowConfidenceBall.title: BluePilot: Show Confidence Ball (C3X)
BPShowConfidenceBall.description: Display the confidence ball on the left side of the driving view on TICI.

BPAnimateSteeringWheel.title: BluePilot: Animate Steering Wheel
BPAnimateSteeringWheel.description: Rotate the steering wheel icon to match the current steering angle.

BPUIDebugLog.title: BluePilot: UI Debug Logging
BPUIDebugLog.description: Log UI state transitions for diagnosing rendering issues on device.

Blindspot.title: SunnyPilot: Show Blind Spot Warnings
Blindspot.description: Show a red indication if a car is in your blind spot.

WifiFavoriteSSID.title: BluePilot: Preferred WiFi Network
WifiFavoriteSSID.description: Automatically connect to this WiFi network when available. Select from saved networks, or leave empty to disable auto-connect. The device will check every 30 seconds and connect to this network even if currently connected to another network.

BlinkerPauseLaneChange.title: BluePilot: Disable Lane Change Under Certain Speed
BlinkerPauseLaneChange.description: Use 'Blinker Min Lateral Control Speed' to specify speed

ShowBlindspotOverlay.title: BluePilot: Show Blindspot Overlay
ShowBlindspotOverlay.description: Display red overlay when a vehicle is detected in your blind spot.

disable_BP_long_UI.title: BluePilot: Bypass BP Longitudinal Control
disable_BP_long_UI.description: Use stock openpilot longitudinal control instead of BluePilot longitudinal control.

disable_downhill_comp_UI.title: BluePilot: Disable Downhill Compensation
disable_downhill_comp_UI.description: Disable BluePilot downhill compensation for longitudinal control.

BPPortalPort.title: BluePilot: BP Web Portal Port
BPPortalPort.description: HTTP port for the BluePilot web portal (default 8088).

EnableWebRoutesServer.title: BluePilot: Enable Web Route Server
EnableWebRoutesServer.description: Enable the BluePilot web route server for viewing routes and videos from a browser.
